name: instant-worker — orphan_sweep reap path itself is broken (reap_failed > 0 sustained 30m)
description: P1 warning. instant_orphan_sweep_reap_failed_total{reason} > 0 sustained for >30 minutes. The reconciler detected an orphan but could not clean it up — most likely a k8s API outage, RBAC drift (worker SA lost namespace-delete), or a DB write failure. Single transient events are fine; sustained rate means the reap path itself is broken and orphan resources will accumulate against the cluster until the underlying issue is fixed. Check instant-worker pod logs for `jobs.orphan_sweep.*_delete_failed` lines, then walk the same reason label back to either kubectl or the platform DB. Source: worker/internal/metrics/metrics.go (OrphanSweepReapFailedTotal), emit site worker/internal/jobs/orphan_sweep_reconciler.go.

nrql.query: SELECT sum(instant_orphan_sweep_reap_failed_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_orphan_sweep_reap_failed_total' FACET reason
